name: RuBench: A Repository-Level Agentic Coding Benchmark with Natively Authored Russian Task Specifications

description: arXiv:2607.06411v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Developers increasingly delegate real maintenance work to product-grade coding agents, and many state tasks in their native language, in the style of a customer request rather than a curated English issue. We introduce RuBench 1.0, a benchmark of 25 tasks mined from recent fix commits in five live open-source repositories (aiohttp, aiogr...
author: Evgeny Shilov (Independent Researcher)
